title: Build a Single-Branch Bank in C++

milestones.title: Milestone 1: Money struct and opening accounts

tests.name: open two accounts, ids increment, zero starting balance
tests.stdin:
open Alice
open Bob
balance 1
balance 2
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Opened #2 Bob
Account #1 Alice: $0.00
Account #2 Bob: $0.00

tests.name: balance on unknown id reports error
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Account #1 Alice: $0.00
Unknown account #99

tests.name: format_money prints two pennies digits even when under ten cents
tests.stdin:
open Alice
open Bob
open Carol
balance 3
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Opened #2 Bob
Opened #3 Carol
Account #3 Carol: $0.00

milestones.title: Milestone 2: Deposits, withdrawals, and insufficient funds

tests.name: deposit then withdraw updates the balance
tests.stdin:
open Alice
deposit 1 12345
withdraw 1 5000
balance 1
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Deposited $123.45 to #1 (balance $123.45)
Withdrew $50.00 from #1 (balance $73.45)
Account #1 Alice: $73.45

tests.name: withdraw exceeding balance is refused and balance is unchanged
tests.stdin:
open Alice
deposit 1 1000
withdraw 1 5000
balance 1
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Deposited $10.00 to #1 (balance $10.00)
Insufficient funds for #1 (balance $10.00)
Account #1 Alice: $10.00

tests.name: deposit on unknown id reports error and changes nothing
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Unknown account #42
Account #1 Alice: $0.00

tests.name: successful transfer debits source and credits destination
tests.stdin:
open Alice
open Bob
deposit 1 5000
transfer 1 2 2000
balance 1
balance 2
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Opened #2 Bob
Deposited $50.00 to #1 (balance $50.00)
Transferred $20.00 #1 -> #2
Account #1 Alice: $30.00
Account #2 Bob: $20.00

tests.name: transfer larger than source balance is refused and neither side changes
tests.stdin:
open Alice
open Bob
deposit 1 1000
transfer 1 2 999999
balance 1
balance 2
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Opened #2 Bob
Deposited $10.00 to #1 (balance $10.00)
Insufficient funds for #1 (balance $10.00)
Account #1 Alice: $10.00
Account #2 Bob: $0.00

tests.name: transfer with an unknown destination is rejected
tests.stdin:
open Alice
deposit 1 5000
transfer 1 9 10
balance 1
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Deposited $50.00 to #1 (balance $50.00)
Unknown account in transfer
Account #1 Alice: $50.00

tests.name: history lists deposit, withdrawal, and transfer-out for the sender
tests.stdin:
open Alice
open Bob
deposit 1 10000
withdraw 1 2500
transfer 1 2 1500
history 1
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Opened #2 Bob
Deposited $100.00 to #1 (balance $100.00)
Withdrew $25.00 from #1 (balance $75.00)
Transferred $15.00 #1 -> #2
History for #1 Alice:
  deposit $100.00
  withdrawal $25.00
  transfer-out $15.00 (#2)

tests.name: history for the recipient shows the transfer-in
tests.stdin:
open Alice
open Bob
deposit 1 5000
transfer 1 2 1500
history 2
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Opened #2 Bob
Deposited $50.00 to #1 (balance $50.00)
Transferred $15.00 #1 -> #2
History for #2 Bob:
  transfer-in $15.00 (#1)

tests.name: history on unknown id reports error
summary with no accounts reports zero and no assets
summary reports account count and total assets
tests.stdin:
open Alice
open Bob
deposit 1 10000
deposit 2 25050
summary
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Opened #2 Bob
Deposited $100.00 to #1 (balance $100.00)
Deposited $250.50 to #2 (balance $250.50)
Accounts: 2
Total assets: $350.50

tests.name: summary does not modify accounts
tests.stdin:
open Alice
deposit 1 7777
summary
balance 1
quit
tests.expected_stdout:
Opened #1 Alice
Deposited $77.77 to #1 (balance $77.77)
Accounts: 1
Total assets: $77.77
Account #1 Alice: $77.77
